authorities.name: Wikipedia ship infoboxes
authorities.convention: Lists double-occupancy as primary figure; maximum as secondary

authorities.name: CLIA cruise-line marketing
authorities.convention: Uses lower-berth/double-occupancy for industry fleet stats and orderbook

authorities.name: Norwegian own site
authorities.convention: 'Guest Capacity double occupancy' is the explicit label

authorities.name: Schema.org Vehicle.passengerCapacity
authorities.convention: 'number of passengers that can be seated' — aligns with double-occupancy

validator_canonical_source: assets/data/ships/<line>/<slug>.page.json field stats_fallback.guests (parse first integer); fall back to most-frequent on-page integer if page.json absent
